title: rottlera digyna
intro: Rottlera digyna, also known as 'Kutaja', is an evergreen tree or shrub that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Rottlera digyna include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized for centuries in traditional medicine. The health benefits of the plant include the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Rottlera digyna include its leaves being used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments, and it is also used in the form of essential oil for topical application.
